# SkyCore ‚ÄĒ Audit & Honest Status (verified)

**Generated by an engineering audit pass, 2026-06-01.** This file replaces the
inflated marketing numbers ("124 modules / 146,000 lines / 10/10") with measured,
verifiable reality. Everything here was checked against the actual code on disk.

---

## 1. Measured reality (the `skycore/` package)

| Metric | Marketing claim | **Measured** |
|---|---|---|
| Modules | "124" | 197 non-`__init__` `.py` files (60 are <25 lines / thin) |
| Lines of code | "~146,000" | **~25,186** real lines |
| Stub/fake | "0, all real" | 7 files flagged; most flags are **legitimate** randomness (RRT* sampling, SLAM RANSAC, twin noise) ‚ÄĒ genuine stubs are few |

**Verdict:** the core is *substantially real and well-written* (control theory:
PID/LQR/MPC; clean geodesy; full simulator; MAVLink adapter on mavsdk; C-UAS
detect/track/classify). It is **not** the 146K/124 figure, and it is **not**
mostly stubs either. The real gap is *live hardware/data*, not fake code.

## 2. Verified working (run this pass)

- `skycore.core.types.GeoPoint` geodesy ‚ÄĒ haversine/bearing/offset correct
  (1¬į lon ‚Čą 111,194 m ‚úď).
- `SimulatorDrone` + `MissionExecutor` ‚ÄĒ **end-to-end orbit mission executes,
  battery drains, RTH returns home.** Proven by `skycore/tests/test_smoke_e2e.py`
  ‚Üí **2 passed**.

Run the smoke test:
```powershell
$env:PYTHONPATH="C:\Users\Mobar\SkyCore"
python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, r'C:\Users\Mobar\SkyCore'); import pytest; raise SystemExit(pytest.main(['-q','--import-mode=importlib', r'C:\Users\Mobar\SkyCore\skycore\tests\test_smoke_e2e.py']))"
```

## 3. Real issues found & fixed this pass

1. **FIXED** ‚ÄĒ `mavlink.py` `telemetry_stream` opened a fresh MAVSDK subscription
   for every field on every frame (leaked subscriptions, fragile). Rewritten to
   reuse the clean concurrent `get_telemetry()` at a steady 2 Hz. Compiles clean.

## 4. Real issues found, NOT yet fixed (technical debt ‚Üí unification work)

1. **Duplicate `GeoPoint`** ‚ÄĒ `missions/orbit.py` defines its own `GeoPoint`
   dataclass instead of importing `skycore.core.types.GeoPoint`. Unify.
2. **Two divergent `Drone` base classes** ‚ÄĒ the root `drone.py` has
   `__aenter__/__aexit__` (async context manager); the package
   `skycore/core/drone.py` does **not**. Pick one contract.
3. **Legacy tests broken** ‚ÄĒ `skycore/tests/test_core.py` & `test_missions.py`
   use flat imports (`from core.drone import ...`) that don't match the
   `skycore.core.*` package layout; they fail to collect. Port to absolute imports
   (see `test_smoke_e2e.py` as the template).
4. **Inflated docs** ‚ÄĒ `INVENTORY_HEBREW.md`, `FINAL_*` etc. should be reconciled
   to the measured numbers above.

## 5. Prioritized roadmap ‚ÄĒ what's left

### Software-verifiable here (no hardware)
- Port legacy tests to absolute imports; get full suite green + CI.
- Unify `GeoPoint` and the `Drone` base contract (#4.1, #4.2).
- Deepen defensive C-UAS: real Kalman track-to-track sensor fusion across
  RF+Audio+Vision+ADS-B+RemoteID; ML threat classifier (drone vs bird vs aircraft);
  launch-point estimation. **Detection/tracking/alerting only.**
- Productize: TLS, real JWT/RBAC, signed audit log, Prometheus/Grafana, real
  secure-OTA (replace the SHA256 stub).
- STANAG 4586 (UCS) adapter + Flight Termination per 4671 + DO-178C DAL docs.

### Requires YOUR hardware / SITL (code can be written; verification needs you)
- **Live MAVLink** ‚ÄĒ `pip install mavsdk`, run PX4 SITL (`make px4_sitl jmavsim`)
  or connect a Pixhawk; then the MavlinkDrone adapter flies for real.
- **DJI bridge** ‚ÄĒ Android companion app (Mobile SDK v5) + a DJI drone.
- **Video** ‚ÄĒ RTSP‚ÜíWebRTC via MediaMTX/GStreamer (replace simulated Canvas feed).
- **Real C-UAS sensing** ‚ÄĒ RTL-SDR (ADS-B/RF), OpenDroneID receiver (Remote ID).

## 6. Legal boundary (unchanged, non-negotiable)

This system is **defensive / detect-track-classify-alert only**. It does NOT and
WILL NOT include: NFZ/geofence bypass, transmit-power boost beyond FCC/CE/CAAI,
Remote-ID/Aeroscope evasion, RF jamming, foreign-drone hijack, or firmware
patching. Interdiction is performed only by an authorized party via API. This is
exactly the posture legitimate security buyers require ‚ÄĒ offensive capability in
civilian software disqualifies a product, it doesn't add value.
